title: Peruvian Citrusy Wrap
description: A refreshing Peruvian-inspired wrap with a tangy citrusy twist. Perfect for a quick snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Peruvian-Style Sliced Vegetables
ingredients.notes: Red onion, bell pepper, tomato, etc.

instructions: Place the lettuce leaves on the wrap.
Spread the citrusy sauce on top of the lettuce.
Add the Peruvian-style sliced vegetables on top of the sauce.
Fold the wrap to enclose the filling.
